name: White-Cooked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Place the chicken in a kettle with broth, scallions, and ginger.
3. Bring to a simmer.
4. Skim off any scum that rises to the surface.
5. Reduce heat to the lowest setting and let simmer for 20 minutes, covered.
6. Turn off the heat and allow it to steep for 1 hour.
7. Remove the chicken, bones, and arrange on a platter.
8. Take 1 cup of liquid (save the rest for another use).
9. Bring the liquid to a boil and reduce by half.
10. Add dark soy sauce, dry sherry, minced garlic, and rice vinegar.
11. Mix in cornstarch mixed with water.
12. Cook until thickened. Taste and season with salt as necessary.
13. Add scallions at the last moment.
14. Pour the sauce over the chicken and flick a few drops of sesame oil over the top.
15. Serve warm or cool.
